assertions.deeperFact: The digest covers saved-context recovery, guest state, account state, and what happens when a user signs in.
assertions.methodBoundary: I will keep login guidance separate from astrology judgement and will not claim private data is recovered unless the app confirms it.
assertions.missingHonesty: Predicta must name missing or pending context instead of inventing it.

predictaAnswer: Login context is active. The digest covers saved-context recovery, guest state, account state, and what happens when a user signs in, so I can explain continuity without pretending more than the app has confirmed. I will keep login guidance separate from astrology judgement and will not claim private data is recovered unless the app confirms it. Signing in helps continuity; paid access still requires entitlement or verified payment.
userQuestion: If I log in, will Predicta remember me?
